title: 10 Signs You're Confusing Confidence with Pride
caption:
Confidence and pride look almost identical — until the pressure hits.

The confident man can be corrected. The proud man deflects. The confident man is glad when a brother wins. The proud man does the math on where that puts him.

Scripture doesn't hate ambition or strength. It hates the man who can't get on his knees. There's a line between them, and most men don't know which side they're on.

Here are 10 signs you've crossed it.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6.

Save this. Share it with a man who needs it — including yourself.

#faith #christianmen #humility #pride #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #realwalk #christianity #theethosapp
theme: He walks humbly. Sturdy, not soft.
